SEQUENCE.COMMENT: vfUxlrSave - service for saving data to a uxlr cross reference table

array.name: field_options
array.value: INSONLY - Perform an INSERT to the cross reference - error if the record already exists
INSUPD - Perform an INSERT if the record doesnt exist - UPDATE if it does

array.name: field_options
array.value: 0 - If an error occurs, return the status value and message (default)
1 - If an error occurs, trip the error handler

array.name: field_options
array.value: INSONLY - Perform an INSERT to the cross reference - error if the record already exists
INSUPD - Perform an INSERT if the record doesnt exist - UPDATE if it does

array.name: field_options
array.value: 0 - If an error occurs, return the status value and message (default)
1 - If an error occurs, trip the error handler

array.name: field_options
array.value: SIMPLE - Perform a simple, 1-keyset, 1-valueset type lookup (returns 1 record or an error) (default)
MULTIREC - Perform a multi-record lookup (returns 0 to n records or an error)
DEFAULT - Performs a default-style lookup (not yet available)

array.name: field_options
array.value: 0 - If an error occurs, return the status value and message (default)
1 - If an error occurs, trip the error handler

array.name: field_options
array.value: INSONLY - Perform an INSERT to the cross reference - error if the record already exists
INSUPD - Perform an INSERT if the record doesnt exist - UPDATE if it does

array.name: field_options
array.value: 0 - If an error occurs, return the status value and message (default)
1 - If an error occurs, trip the error handler

array.value: INSONLY - Perform an INSERT to the cross reference - error if the record already exists
INSUPD - Perform an INSERT if the record doesnt exist - UPDATE if it does

array.value: 0 - If an error occurs, return the status value and message (default)
1 - If an error occurs, trip the error handler

INSUPD - Perform an INSERT if the record doesnt exist - UPDATE if it does

1 - If an error occurs, trip the error handler

INSUPD - Perform an INSERT if the record doesnt exist - UPDATE if it does

1 - If an error occurs, trip the error handler

array.value: INSONLY - Perform an INSERT to the cross reference - error if the record already exists
INSUPD - Perform an INSERT if the record doesnt exist - UPDATE if it does

1 - If an error occurs, trip the error handler

array.name: field_options
array.value: INSONLY - Perform an INSERT to the cross reference - error if the record already exists
INSUPD - Perform an INSERT if the record doesnt exist - UPDATE if it does

array.name: field_options
array.value: 0 - If an error occurs, return the status value and message (default)
1 - If an error occurs, trip the error handler

array.name: field_options
array.value: INSONLY - Perform an INSERT to the cross reference - error if the record already exists
INSUPD - Perform an INSERT if the record doesnt exist - UPDATE if it does

array.name: field_options
array.value: 0 - If an error occurs, return the status value and message (default)
1 - If an error occurs, trip the error handler

SEQUENCE.COMMENT: read the metadata about the tablecode (number of defined keys and values)

MAP.COMMENT: sSql = 'SELECT * FROM TUXLR WHERE fKey00='0-uxlr' AND fKey01='tabledata' AND fKey02='%isaUxlrKeyIn[0]%'

array.name: field_options
array.value: INSONLY - Perform an INSERT to the cross reference - error if the record already exists
INSUPD - Perform an INSERT if the record doesnt exist - UPDATE if it does

array.name: field_options
array.value: 0 - If an error occurs, return the status value and message (default)
1 - If an error occurs, trip the error handler

Values.value: SELECT * FROM TUXLR WHERE fKey00='0-uxlr' AND fKey01='tabledata' AND fKey02='%isaUxlrKeyIn[0]%'

array.name: field_options
array.value: INSONLY - Perform an INSERT to the cross reference - error if the record already exists
INSUPD - Perform an INSERT if the record doesnt exist - UPDATE if it does

array.value: 0 - If an error occurs, return the status value and message (default)
1 - If an error occurs, trip the error handler

array.name: field_options
array.value: INSONLY - Perform an INSERT to the cross reference - error if the record already exists
INSUPD - Perform an INSERT if the record doesnt exist - UPDATE if it does

array.name: field_options
array.value: 0 - If an error occurs, return the status value and message (default)
1 - If an error occurs, trip the error handler

INVOKE.NAME: $default
INVOKE.COMMENT: -8406 Metadata for %isaUxlrKeyIn[0]% could not be found - please check spelling

array.value: INSONLY - Perform an INSERT to the cross reference - error if the record already exists
INSUPD - Perform an INSERT if the record doesnt exist - UPDATE if it does

array.name: field_options
array.value: 0 - If an error occurs, return the status value and message (default)
1 - If an error occurs, trip the error handler

array.name: field_options
array.value: 0 - If an error occurs, return the status value and message (default)
1 - If an error occurs, trip the error handler

SEQUENCE.COMMENT: build an SQL string from the set of input keys and values and execute it

MAP.COMMENT: sSql = 'SELECT * FROM TUXLR WHERE ' and sIndex = -1

array.name: field_options
array.value: INSONLY - Perform an INSERT to the cross reference - error if the record already exists
INSUPD - Perform an INSERT if the record doesnt exist - UPDATE if it does

array.name: field_options
array.value: 0 - If an error occurs, return the status value and message (default)
1 - If an error occurs, trip the error handler

MAP.COMMENT: sIndex = $iteration - 1 $iteration starts at 1 in this loop so subtract one to get what we need

array.value: INSONLY - Perform an INSERT to the cross reference - error if the record already exists
INSUPD - Perform an INSERT if the record doesnt exist - UPDATE if it does

MAP.COMMENT: sKeycnt = sIndex we exclude the tablecode from the count of keys

array.name: field_options
array.value: INSONLY - Perform an INSERT to the cross reference - error if the record already exists
INSUPD - Perform an INSERT if the record doesnt exist - UPDATE if it does

INSUPD - Perform an INSERT if the record doesnt exist - UPDATE if it does

1 - If an error occurs, trip the error handler

MAP.COMMENT: sIndex = $iteration - 1 $iteration starts at 1 in this loop so subtract one to get what we need

INSUPD - Perform an INSERT if the record doesnt exist - UPDATE if it does

array.value: false
true

BRANCH.COMMENT: check that they didnt supply too many keys or too many values

INVOKE.COMMENT: -8407 You supplied %sKeycnt% keys - the table only has %sNumkeys% defined

array.name: field_options
array.value: INSONLY - Perform an INSERT to the cross reference - error if the record already exists
INSUPD - Perform an INSERT if the record doesnt exist - UPDATE if it does

array.name: field_options
array.value: 0 - If an error occurs, return the status value and message (default)
1 - If an error occurs, trip the error handler

MAP.COMMENT: replace the trailing , with ', fDateModified = '%sDateModified%' WHERE

array.name: field_options
array.value: INSONLY - Perform an INSERT to the cross reference - error if the record already exists
INSUPD - Perform an INSERT if the record doesnt exist - UPDATE if it does

array.name: field_options
array.value: 0 - If an error occurs, return the status value and message (default)
1 - If an error occurs, trip the error handler

array.name: field_options
array.value: INSONLY - Perform an INSERT to the cross reference - error if the record already exists
INSUPD - Perform an INSERT if the record doesnt exist - UPDATE if it does

array.name: field_options
array.value: 0 - If an error occurs, return the status value and message (default)
1 - If an error occurs, trip the error handler

array.name: field_options
array.value: false
true

MAP.COMMENT: sIndex = $iteration - 1 $iteration starts at 1 in this loop so subtract one to get what we need

INSUPD - Perform an INSERT if the record doesnt exist - UPDATE if it does
